title: SALKING 200ml Ceramic Diffuser, Black Stone Essential Oil Diffuser, Ultrasonic Aromatherapy Diffusers with 7 Colour Light Timers, Auto Shut-Off Function for Home
features: Natural Textured Ceramic—Our aroma diffuser featuring a natural black stone finish, this classic diffuser is the perfect addition to scent and style your home. It will look like a contemporary art piece rather than a ultrasonic diffusers. With the aromas of your favourite essential oils, it softly streams essential oil-infused steam out into your space,lending your interior spaces a sense of luxurious comfort.

7 Color LED Lights—Press the light button of ceramic diffuser to select the color as needed,each color from bright to dim. Also you can turn to the automatic light changing mode to relax or turn off all lights for total darkness. And the thin light strip on the bottom is optional for those who prefer to keep their rooms dark at night. A fine cool mist releases the aromatic properties throughout the air, while the LED colored light helps you create your desired ambiance.

Silent Ultrasonic Diffuser - Ultrasonic technology provides cool mist and pleasant aromas with essential oils to create a calm and relaxing environment. This essential oil diffuser holds up to 200ml of water and produces up to 30ml of moisture per hour. Stone oil diffuser has 4 timer-setting modes: ON/1H/2H/4H. Less than 20db anti-noise structure ensures a comfortable and warm sleeping environment.

BPA Free And Waterless Auto Off—This cool mist humidifier is made of eco-friendly PP materials,which is BPA-free. The oil diffuser essential oils will auto-off when it is waterless, adds to safety and energy efficiency. It is safe enough even if you give it to elderly people, don't need to worry that they forget to turn it off. This ceramic essential oil diffuser transforms water and essential oil into fragrant mist for up to 8 hours

Spa-Like Cozy Tone - Aromatherapy is an easy way to improve your mood. All you need to do is add water and several drops of your favorite essential oils to release a soothing or energizing aroma into your environment. As the gentle mist and soft light surround you, a sense of calm and comfort transforms your environment into a personal oasis.
